channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: Call for the B1 Preliminary (PET) exam on 25 + 27 May 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B1 Preliminary (PET) exam scheduled on 25 + 27 May 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the B2 First (FCE) exam on 25 + 27 May 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B2 First (FCE) exam scheduled on 25 + 27 May 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the C1 Advanced (CAE) exam on 25 + 28 May 2026 - SOLD OUT
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English C1 Advanced (CAE) exam scheduled on 25 + 28 May 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Regional scholarships - provisional ranking a.y. 2025/2026
item.description: The following provisional ranking has been published a.y. 2025/2026: Regional scholarships - Students who attended the “open semester” and enrolled in the second semester.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: MyCampus Survey – Service quality starts with you
item.description: First-year undergraduate students can complete the MyCampus Survey until 17 April 2026. Just spare a few minutes of your time to help us identify needs and issues regarding the services offered by the University.%0A%0A🔗 Learn more

item.title: University scholarships - final ranking a.y. 2025/2026
item.description: The following final ranking has been published a.y. 2025/2026: University scholarships - Students who attended the “open semester” at Unimi and enrolled in the second semester.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: Call for CELI i exams - A2 and B1 on 6 May 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the CELI 1 i A2 and CELI 2 i cittadinanza B1 exams scheduled on 6 May 2026.%0APLEASE NOTE: seats for the CELI 1 i A2 and CELI 2 i B1 exams are sold out.%0A%0A %0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Extended weekend opening hours at the BICF Library
item.description: From Saturday, 7 February 2026, the Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Computer Sciences Library (BICF) will extend its weekend opening hours: Saturday and Sunday, 9-20.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: University Library Service – spring course calendar 2026
item.description: The list of courses offered by the University Library Service in spring 2026 is now online. These courses focus on the use of databases, and are open to the entire University community.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it
